ddls:
CREATE TABLE "influenza_vaccination" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "influenza_season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the influenza season record */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was collected */,
  "cdph_hai_hcp_flu_vaccination" TEXT /* Name of the public health department (CDPH) program */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the data was collected */,
  "mask_required" TEXT /* Whether masks are required in the county */,
  "num_hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the county */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees in the county */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of employees vaccinated in the county */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influenza_vaccination_influenza_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("influenza_season_id") REFERENCES influenza_seasons ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel_vaccination" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "influenza_vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the influenza vaccination record */,
  "personnel_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare personnel (e.g., HCP, Employee, Contractor, LIP, Student/Volunteer) */,
  "num_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of personnel vaccinated */,
  "num_working" INTEGER /* Number of personnel working */,
  "percent_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of personnel vaccinated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_vaccination_influenza_vaccination_id FOREIGN KEY ("influenza_vaccination_id") REFERENCES influenza_vaccination ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the hospital is located */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code for the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the hospital */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hospital is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the hospital */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the personnel works */,
  "personnel_type" TEXT /* Type of personnel (e.g., HCP, Employee, Contractor, LIP, Student/Volunteer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the personnel */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the personnel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influenza_seasons" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influenza season */,
  "season" TEXT /* Name of the influenza season (e.g., 2018-19) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the influenza season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the influenza season */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "influenza_vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the influenza vaccination record */,
  "on_track" TEXT /* Whether the county is on track to achieve a 90% vaccination rate by 2020 */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_influenza_vaccination_id FOREIGN KEY ("influenza_vaccination_id") REFERENCES influenza_vaccination ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_types" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination type */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vaccination type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the personnel record */,
  "vaccination_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccination type record */,
  "date_vaccinated" TEXT /* Date the personnel was vaccinated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_vaccination_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_type_id") REFERENCES vaccination_types ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_personnel_id FOREIGN KEY ("personnel_id") REFERENCES personnel ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personnel_vaccination_rate" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital record */,
  "personnel_type" TEXT /* Type of personnel (e.g., HCP, Employee, Contractor, LIP, Student/Volunteer) */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate for the personnel type in the hospital */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personnel_vaccination_rate_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("id")
)
